revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=等波神社| 所在地=滋賀県[[伊香郡]][[木之本町]]田部6-1| 祭神=鳥磐橡樟船尊| 社格=式内社
村社| 創建=[[白鳳]]13年| 例祭=[[4月9日]]| 神事=オコナイ（2月8日・9日）}} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[伊香郡]][[木之本町]]に鎮座する神社である。[[式内社]]である。旧社格は村社。 ==祭神== * [[鳥磐橡樟船尊]] 〔配祀神〕 * [[仲哀天皇]] * [[神功皇后]] ==歴史== :[[白鳳]]13年の創祀と伝わる。延喜[[式内社]]である。[[明治]]9年に[[村社]]に列格した。 ==神紋== :二ッ巴 ==祭事== * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 ==境内社== * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 == 関連項目 == *[[神道]] *[[神社]] {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:村社]] [[Category:木之本町]] {{Shinto-stub}}

{{神社| 名称=等波神社| 所在地=滋賀県[[伊香郡]][[木之本町]]田部6-1| 祭神=鳥磐橡樟船尊| 社格=式内社
村社| 創建=[[白鳳]]13年| 例祭=[[4月9日]]| 神事=オコナイ（2月8日・9日）}} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]（旧[[伊香郡]][[木之本町]]）に鎮座する神社である。[[式内社]]である。旧社格は村社。 ==祭神== * [[鳥磐橡樟船尊]] 〔配祀神〕 * [[仲哀天皇]] * [[神功皇后]] ==歴史== :[[白鳳]]13年の創祀と伝わる。延喜[[式内社]]である。[[明治]]9年に[[村社]]に列格した。 ==神紋== :二ッ巴 ==祭事== * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 ==境内社== * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 == 関連項目 == *[[神道]] *[[神社]] {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:村社]] [[Category:長浜市]] {{Shinto-stub}}

{{神社| 名称=等波神社| 所在地=滋賀県[[長浜市]][[木之本町]]田部6-1| 祭神=鳥磐橡樟船尊| 社格=式内社
村社| 創建=[[白鳳]]13年| 例祭=[[4月9日]]| 神事=オコナイ（2月8日・9日）}} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]（旧[[伊香郡]][[木之本町]]）に鎮座する神社である。[[式内社]]である。旧社格は村社。 ==祭神== * [[鳥磐橡樟船尊]] 〔配祀神〕 * [[仲哀天皇]] * [[神功皇后]] ==歴史== :[[白鳳]]13年の創祀と伝わる。延喜[[式内社]]である。[[明治]]9年に[[村社]]に列格した。 ==神紋== :二ッ巴 ==祭事== * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 ==境内社== * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 == 関連項目 == *[[神道]] *[[神社]] {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:村社]] [[Category:長浜市]] {{Shinto-stub}}

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 等波神社 |画像 = [[画像:Gazoubosyu.jpg]] |所在地 = 滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|scale:25000}} |祭神 = 鳥磐橡樟船尊 |社格 = 式内小社
旧村社 |創建 = 伝白鳳13年（684年） |本殿 = [[流造|一間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[4月9日]] |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日・9日） }} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]（旧[[伊香郡]][[木之本町]]）に鎮座する神社である。[[式内社]]である。[[旧社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 祭神 == [[鳥之石楠船神|鳥磐橡樟船尊]]を主祭神に、[[仲哀天皇]]、[[神功皇后]]を配祀する。 == 歴史 == [[白鳳]]13年（[[684年]]）の創祀と伝わる。[[延喜式内社]]である。[[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）10月に[[村社]]に列格し、同42年（[[1909年]]）には[[神饌幣帛料供進神社]]の指定を受けた。 == 神紋 == *二ッ巴 == 祭事 == * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 == 境内社 == * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:村社]] [[Category:長浜市]] {{Shinto-stub}}

{{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 等波神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=長浜市}} |所在地 = 滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鳥磐橡樟船尊 |社格 = 式内小社
旧村社 |創建 = 伝白鳳13年（684年） |本殿 = [[流造|一間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[4月9日]] |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日・9日） }} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]に鎮座する神社である。[[式内社]]である。[[旧社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 祭神 == [[鳥之石楠船神|鳥磐橡樟船尊]]を主祭神に、[[仲哀天皇]]、[[神功皇后]]を配祀する。 == 歴史 == [[白鳳]]13年（[[684年]]）の創祀と伝わる。[[延喜式内社]]である。[[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）10月に[[村社]]に列格し、同42年（[[1909年]]）には[[神饌幣帛料供進神社]]の指定を受けた。 == 神紋 == *二ッ巴 == 祭事 == * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 == 境内社 == * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 == 脚注 == {{節stub}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

{{nihongo|'''Toba Shrine'''|等波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Toba Shrine'''|等波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Toba Shrine'''|等波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Toba Shrine'''|等波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Toba Shrine'''|等波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Toba Shrine'''|等波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 等波神社 |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]木之本町田部6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鳥磐橡樟船尊 |社格 = [[式内小社]]
旧[[村社]] |創建 = 伝・[[白鳳]]13年（684年） |本殿 = [[流造|一間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[4月9日]] |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日・9日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=等波神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]に鎮座する神社である。[[式内社]]である。[[旧社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 祭神 == [[鳥之石楠船神|鳥磐橡樟船尊]]を主祭神に、[[仲哀天皇]]、[[神功皇后]]を配祀する。 == 歴史 == [[白鳳]]13年（[[684年]]）の創祀と伝わる。[[延喜式内社]]である。[[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）10月に[[村社]]に列格し、同42年（[[1909年]]）には[[神饌幣帛料供進社]]の指定を受けた。 == 神紋 == *二ッ巴 == 祭事 == * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 == 境内社 == * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

鳥居 |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]木之本町田部6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鳥磐橡樟船尊 |社格 = [[式内小社]]
旧[[村社]] |創建 = 伝・[[白鳳]]13年（684年） |本殿 = [[流造|一間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[4月9日]] |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日・9日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=等波神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]に鎮座する神社である。[[式内社]]である。[[旧社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 祭神 == [[鳥之石楠船神|鳥磐橡樟船尊]]を主祭神に、[[仲哀天皇]]、[[神功皇后]]を配祀する。 == 歴史 == [[白鳳]]13年（[[684年]]）の創祀と伝わる。[[延喜式内社]]である。[[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）10月に[[村社]]に列格し、同42年（[[1909年]]）には[[神饌幣帛料供進社]]の指定を受けた。 == 神紋 == *二ッ巴 == 祭事 == * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 == 境内社 == * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] ==End Japanese==

旧[[村社]] |創建 = 伝・[[白鳳]]13年（684年） |本殿 = [[流造|一間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[4月9日]] |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日・9日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=等波神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]に鎮座する神社である。[[式内社]]である。[[旧社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 祭神 == [[鳥之石楠船神|鳥磐橡樟船尊]]を主祭神に、[[仲哀天皇]]、[[神功皇后]]を配祀する。 == 歴史 == [[白鳳]]13年（[[684年]]）の創祀と伝わる。[[延喜式内社]]である。[[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）10月に[[村社]]に列格し、同42年（[[1909年]]）には[[神饌幣帛料供進社]]の指定を受けた。 == 神紋 == *二ッ巴 == 祭事 == * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 == 境内社 == * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

{{nihongo|'''Toba Shrine'''|等波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 等波神社 |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}木之本町田部6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鳥磐橡樟船尊 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|白鳳|Q11580612}}13年（684年） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月9日|Q2504}} |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日・9日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=等波神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}に鎮座する神社である。{{jalink|式内社}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|鳥之石楠船神|Q10731425|鳥磐橡樟船尊}}を主祭神に、{{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}、{{jalink|神功皇后|Q232803}}を配祀する。 === 歴史 === {{jalink|白鳳|Q11580612}}13年（{{jalink|684年|Q31128}}）の創祀と伝わる。{{jalink|延喜式内社}}である。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）10月に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列格し、同42年（{{jalink|1909年|Q2057}}）には{{jalink|神饌幣帛料供進社}}の指定を受けた。 === 神紋 === *二ッ巴 === 祭事 === * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 === 境内社 === * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 等波神社 |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}木之本町田部6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鳥磐橡樟船尊 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|白鳳|Q11580612}}13年（684年） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月9日|Q2504}} |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日・9日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=等波神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}に鎮座する神社である。{{jalink|式内社}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|鳥之石楠船神|Q10731425|鳥磐橡樟船尊}}を主祭神に、{{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}、{{jalink|神功皇后|Q232803}}を配祀する。 === 歴史 === {{jalink|白鳳|Q11580612}}13年（{{jalink|684年|Q31128}}）の創祀と伝わる。{{jalink|延喜式内社}}である。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）10月に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列格し、同42年（{{jalink|1909年|Q2057}}）には{{jalink|神饌幣帛料供進社}}の指定を受けた。 === 神紋 === *二ッ巴 === 祭事 === * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 === 境内社 === * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 等波神社 |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}木之本町田部6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鳥磐橡樟船尊 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|白鳳|Q11580612}}13年（684年） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月9日|Q2504}} |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日・9日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=等波神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}に鎮座する神社である。{{jalink|式内社}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|鳥之石楠船神|Q10731425|鳥磐橡樟船尊}}を主祭神に、{{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}、{{jalink|神功皇后|Q232803}}を配祀する。 === 歴史 === {{jalink|白鳳|Q11580612}}13年（{{jalink|684年|Q31128}}）の創祀と伝わる。{{jalink|延喜式内社}}である。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）10月に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列格し、同42年（{{jalink|1909年|Q2057}}）には{{jalink|神饌幣帛料供進社}}の指定を受けた。 === 神紋 === *二ッ巴 === 祭事 === * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 === 境内社 === * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 等波神社 |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}木之本町田部6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鳥磐橡樟船尊 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|白鳳|Q11580612}}13年（684年） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月9日|Q2504}} |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日・9日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=等波神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}に鎮座する神社である。{{jalink|式内社}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|鳥之石楠船神|Q10731425|鳥磐橡樟船尊}}を主祭神に、{{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}、{{jalink|神功皇后|Q232803}}を配祀する。 === 歴史 === {{jalink|白鳳|Q11580612}}13年（{{jalink|684年|Q31128}}）の創祀と伝わる。{{jalink|延喜式内社}}である。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）10月に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列格し、同42年（{{jalink|1909年|Q2057}}）には{{jalink|神饌幣帛料供進社}}の指定を受けた。 === 神紋 === *二ッ巴 === 祭事 === * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 === 境内社 === * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 等波神社 |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}木之本町田部6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鳥磐橡樟船尊 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|白鳳|Q11580612}}13年（684年） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月9日|Q2504}} |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日・9日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=等波神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}に鎮座する神社である。{{jalink|式内社}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|鳥之石楠船神|Q10731425|鳥磐橡樟船尊}}を主祭神に、{{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}、{{jalink|神功皇后|Q232803}}を配祀する。 === 歴史 === {{jalink|白鳳|Q11580612}}13年（{{jalink|684年|Q31128}}）の創祀と伝わる。{{jalink|延喜式内社}}である。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）10月に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列格し、同42年（{{jalink|1909年|Q2057}}）には{{jalink|神饌幣帛料供進社}}の指定を受けた。 === 神紋 === *二ッ巴 === 祭事 === * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 === 境内社 === * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 等波神社 |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}木之本町田部6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鳥磐橡樟船尊 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|白鳳|Q11580612}}13年（684年） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月9日|Q2504}} |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日・9日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=等波神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''等波神社'''（とばじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}に鎮座する神社である。{{jalink|式内社}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|鳥之石楠船神|Q10731425|鳥磐橡樟船尊}}を主祭神に、{{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}、{{jalink|神功皇后|Q232803}}を配祀する。 === 歴史 === {{jalink|白鳳|Q11580612}}13年（{{jalink|684年|Q31128}}）の創祀と伝わる。{{jalink|延喜式内社}}である。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）10月に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列格し、同42年（{{jalink|1909年|Q2057}}）には{{jalink|神饌幣帛料供進社}}の指定を受けた。 === 神紋 === *二ッ巴 === 祭事 === * オコナイ　2月8日・9日 * 例祭　　　4月9日 === 境内社 === * 稲荷神社 * 若王子神社 * 城﨑神社 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Tradition: {{jalink|684|Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 9|Q2504}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{jalink|Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto}} as its principal deity, with {{jalink|Emperor Chūai|Q179971}} and {{jalink|Empress Jingū|Q232803}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{jalink|684|Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{jalink|Engishiki shrine}}. In October {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}, and in {{jalink|1909|Q2057}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{jalink|Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Tradition: {{jalink|684|Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 9|Q2504}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{jalink|Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto}} as its principal deity, with {{jalink|Emperor Chūai|Q179971}} and {{jalink|Empress Jingū|Q232803}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{jalink|684|Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{jalink|Engishiki shrine}}. In October {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}, and in {{jalink|1909|Q2057}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{jalink|Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Tradition: {{jalink|684|Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 9|Q2504}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{jalink|Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto}} as its principal deity, with {{jalink|Emperor Chūai|Q179971}} and {{jalink|Empress Jingū|Q232803}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{jalink|684|Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{jalink|Engishiki shrine}}. In October {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}, and in {{jalink|1909|Q2057}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{jalink|Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Tradition: {{jalink|684|Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 9|Q2504}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{jalink|Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto}} as its principal deity, with {{jalink|Emperor Chūai|Q179971}} and {{jalink|Empress Jingū|Q232803}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{jalink|684|Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{jalink|Engishiki shrine}}. In October {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}, and in {{jalink|1909|Q2057}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{jalink|Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Tradition: {{jalink|684|Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 9|Q2504}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{jalink|Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto}} as its principal deity, with {{jalink|Emperor Chūai|Q179971}} and {{jalink|Empress Jingū|Q232803}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{jalink|684|Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{jalink|Engishiki shrine}}. In October {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}, and in {{jalink|1909|Q2057}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{jalink|Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]]

former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Tradition: {{jalink|684|Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 9|Q2504}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{jalink|Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto}} as its principal deity, with {{jalink|Emperor Chūai|Q179971}} and {{jalink|Empress Jingū|Q232803}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{jalink|684|Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{jalink|Engishiki shrine}}. In October {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}, and in {{jalink|1909|Q2057}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{jalink|Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|UNKNOWN}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057|1=1909}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504|1=April 9}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-torifune}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803|1=Empress Jingū}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057|1=1909}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504|1=April 9}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-torifune}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803|1=Empress Jingū}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057|1=1909}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504|1=April 9}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-torifune}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803|1=Empress Jingū}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057|1=1909}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504|1=April 9}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-torifune}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803|1=Empress Jingū}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057|1=1909}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504|1=April 9}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-torifune}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803|1=Empress Jingū}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057|1=1909}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504|1=April 9}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-torifune}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803|1=Empress Jingū}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057|1=1909}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * とばじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004571 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市木之本町田部6-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:等波神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11602727}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:49 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Toba Shrine |画像 = [[File:等波神社.jpg|270px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Kinomoto-chō Tabe 6-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|29|47.3|N|136|14|12.7|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Tradition: {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|WD=Q2504|1=April 9}} |神事 = Okonai (February 8-9) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Toba Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Toba Shrine''' (とばじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === It has {{ill|lt=Tori no Iwakusunofune no Kami|Q10731425|WD=Q10731425|lt=Toriiwa Kusunokifune-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-torifune}} as its principal deity, with {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}} and {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803|1=Empress Jingū}} as associated deities. === History === Tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=684|Q31128|WD=Q31128|1=684}} (Hakuhō 13). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. In October {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|WD=Q2057|1=1909}} (Meiji 42) it was designated as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Shrine crest === * Double tomoe === Festivals === * Okonai: February 8-9 * Annual festival: April 9 === Precinct shrines === * Inari Shrine * Wakaoji Shrine * Jōsaki Shrine === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1254 等波神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Toba Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]
